# pain-headless

> The ultimate browser as a service SDK for webscraping

## API
- [AuthenticationError](classes/AuthenticationError.md): AuthenticationError class
- [BrowserNotStartedError](classes/BrowserNotStartedError.md): BrowserNotStartedError class
- [CommandError](classes/CommandError.md): CommandError class
- [CommandNotFoundError](classes/CommandNotFoundError.md): CommandNotFoundError class
- [ConnectionError](classes/ConnectionError.md): ConnectionError class
- [DisconnectedError](classes/DisconnectedError.md): DisconnectedError class
- [InsufficientCreditsError](classes/InsufficientCreditsError.md): InsufficientCreditsError class
- [InvalidParamsError](classes/InvalidParamsError.md): InvalidParamsError class
- [LostBrowserConnectionError](classes/LostBrowserConnectionError.md): LostBrowserConnectionError class
- [NoCaptchaDetectedError](classes/NoCaptchaDetectedError.md): NoCaptchaDetectedError class
- [PainHeadlessError](classes/PainHeadlessError.md): PainHeadlessError class
- [PayloadParsingError](classes/PayloadParsingError.md): PayloadParsingError class
- [ServiceNotAvailableError](classes/ServiceNotAvailableError.md): ServiceNotAvailableError class
- [StealthBrowser](classes/StealthBrowser.md): StealthBrowser class
- [TimeoutError](classes/TimeoutError.md): TimeoutError class
- [WSClient](classes/WSClient.md): WSClient class
- [BrowserLaunchOptions](interfaces/BrowserLaunchOptions.md): BrowserLaunchOptions interface
- [ClickOptions](interfaces/ClickOptions.md): ClickOptions interface
- [CommandResult](interfaces/CommandResult.md): CommandResult interface
- [CreditUsage](interfaces/CreditUsage.md): CreditUsage interface
- [ExistsResult](interfaces/ExistsResult.md): ExistsResult interface
- [ExtractDataOptions](interfaces/ExtractDataOptions.md): ExtractDataOptions interface
- [ExtractFieldOptions](interfaces/ExtractFieldOptions.md): ExtractFieldOptions interface
- [ExtractListOptions](interfaces/ExtractListOptions.md): ExtractListOptions interface
- [ExtractListResult](interfaces/ExtractListResult.md): ExtractListResult interface
- [ExtractTextResult](interfaces/ExtractTextResult.md): ExtractTextResult interface
- [FillFormOptions](interfaces/FillFormOptions.md): FillFormOptions interface
- [InputFillOptions](interfaces/InputFillOptions.md): InputFillOptions interface
- [ScreenshotResult](interfaces/ScreenshotResult.md): ScreenshotResult interface
- [SelectOptions](interfaces/SelectOptions.md): SelectOptions interface
- [SetCheckedOptions](interfaces/SetCheckedOptions.md): SetCheckedOptions interface
- [SolveSimpleCaptchaOptions](interfaces/SolveSimpleCaptchaOptions.md): SolveSimpleCaptchaOptions interface
- [SolveTextCaptchaOptions](interfaces/SolveTextCaptchaOptions.md): SolveTextCaptchaOptions interface
- [TypeOptions](interfaces/TypeOptions.md): TypeOptions interface
- [ExtractAttributesResult](type-aliases/ExtractAttributesResult.md): ExtractAttributesResult type alias
- [ExtractDataResult](type-aliases/ExtractDataResult.md): ExtractDataResult type alias
- [ExtractedDataField](type-aliases/ExtractedDataField.md): ExtractedDataField type alias
- [FillFormValues](type-aliases/FillFormValues.md): FillFormValues type alias
